titleStmt.title: SII 25.286: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 286. (A.R. No. 286 of 1908.) AḶAGĀDRIPUTTŪR, KUMBHAKONAM TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the central shrine in Svarṇapurīśvara temple.
This epigraph is in three pieces, of which two are fragments. Palaeographically they may be assigned to c. 11th century.

The first two of the three peices relate to the gift of lamps to the deity Aḻagiyadēva of Tirupputtūr. In the first instance, Pukkamuchchāṉi Umaiyāṇḍāḷ and brāhmaṇi Uyyavandāḷ are referred to as the donatrix. The second fragment records the endowment of land for the tirunundāviḷakkupuṟam by the ūravar during the reign period of Tribhuvanachakravarti Kulōttuṅgachōḷa. The next piece refers to the ūravar of Māṅgāḍu, whose names are mentioned unlike the second piece and registers some land grant. Mentions Aḻagar Tirupputtūr in Kulōttuṅgaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirupputtūr Aḻakiya tevaṟku rāja rāja tevar potu Āppar Uṭaiyarkku pukka muccāṉi Umaiyāṇṭāḷ vaitta viḷakku Onṟu
pirāmmaṇi Uyyavantāṉ vaitta viḷakku Onṟu Iviḷa‘ḷa’ is written below.kku Iraṇṭum celuttakkaṭavom Ikkoyil kā(ra)ṇi Uṭaiyom .§

—meṟpaṭiyūr veḷḷāḷāṉ paṭṭaṉ vaṭukanātaṉ sahijñaiyātaṉamaikku meṟpaṭiyāneḻutti nālum Ivvūr brāhmaṇi nal—
—yaṉ Ārāvamutu nārāyaṇan sahijñaiyātaṉamaikku meṟpaṭiyāneḻutti nālum tirupuvaṉaccakkaravaṟtikaḷ cikulottuṅka coḻa—
—turār Aḻakiya mādevaṟkku Innāṭṭu māṅkāṭ Ūrvarom Innāyaṉārkku tirunuṉtāviḷakku puṟam—
—nilattukku kiḻpāṟkellai Eṅkaḷur nilattukku meṟkkum teṉpāṟkellai tiruvaraṅkaṉ nilattukku vaṭakkum meṟpaṭi—
—mā Innila mā Ācantirātittavaṟ Antarā paṭa tirununtāviḷakku puṟamāka viṭṭom—

— nāṉa kulottuṅka coḻavaḷanāṭṭu Aḻakar(ā) tiruppu—
—meṟku Eṅkaḷūr nilattun nāṭār kāṇiyenṟu perkūvappaṭṭa—
—kellai kaṇṇāṟṟukku teṟkum Ināṉkellai yāna nā—
—tom Ivūravarom Ivvūr madhyastaṉ mātāṉa ma
ṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai
māṅkāṭṭaṅ kuṭaiyāṉ catturukecari nārāyaṇa te
vaṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai māṅkāṭṭaṅkuṭaiyā
ṉ catturukecari teyvanāyaka ṉeḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 25.286 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
